en: Can you say this like an American? I wanna go with you. I wanna go with you. The words want
ko: 미국식으로 말할 수 있어? I wanna go with you. I wanna go with you

en: and to become wanna. I wanna go with you. What about this sentence? You don't have
ko: want와 to가 합쳐져서 wanna가 돼. I wanna go with you. 그럼 이 문장은?

en: to clean that up by yourself. You don't hafta clean that up by yourself. The words have to
ko: 혼자 치울 필요 없어. You don't hafta clean that up by yourself

en: become hafta in American English. You don't hafta clean that up all by yourself. Let me help you.
ko: 혼자 치울 필요 없어. You don't hafta clean that up by yourself
clean that up all by yourself. 내가 도와줄게. 더 많은 영어 수업을 구독해
